---
title: "UG POL3226 Research Essay - Campaign Contributions and Congressional Voting Behvaviour in the US"
---
This is an undergraduate paper I wrote for professor Amy McKay's class on Money, Lobbying and Policymaking. More specifically, it looks to test whether pharmaceutical PAC campaign contributions had influenced Congressional voting on insulin pricing reforms included in the 2022 Inflation Reduction Act. 

Here, I build my own dataset on 

This paper received a grade of 80/100.
